nasb.text: The priestly sons of Aaron, moreover, shall blow the trumpets; and this shall be for you a perpetual statute throughout your generations.

esv.text: And the sons of Aaron, the priests, shall blow the trumpets. The trumpets shall be to you for a perpetual statute throughout your generations.

cnv.text: 亞倫的子孫作祭司的要作吹號的；這要作你們世世代代永遠的條例。

ccb.text: 做祭司的亚伦子孙要负责吹号，这是世代不变的律例。
